{{Quote|Dear Citizen pilot, It is a dark time for those who cleave to the pillar principles of the Empire. Without heroic intervention by citizen pilots such as you, this horrid 'rebellion' could prove to be the final undoing of our civilization, our liberty... our very lives.|Admiral Cilas Veckon|<ref name="SWG:JTIN" />}}
'''Cilas Veckon''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Hired killers have taken aim against the selfless agents of our government, and have threatened to plunge us head-long into anarchy. Moreover, sensing their despicable opportunities in this 'rebellion,' vast armies of corrupt criminal pirates, smugglers, and assassins have banded together to further tear the fabric of Imperial decency. Your Emperor needs you.|Admiral Cilas Veckon|<ref name="SWG:JTIN" />}}
Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] Cilas Veckon acted as Chief of the [[Imperial Navy Recruitment|Recruitment]] office of the Imperial Navy. As the war with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] intensified after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Admiral Veckon initiated a large recruitment program of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] for the [[Starfighter Corps (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Imperial Starfighter Corps]]. His office identified skilled [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] throughout the galaxy and sent strongly worded recruitment messages to potential recruits. Furthermore, Veckon placed [[Commander/Legends|Commanders]] [[Gunham]], [[Zhanks]] and [[Landau]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], respectively, to oversee major pushes in recruitment.<ref name="SWG:JTIN" /> The recruitment program culminated<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref> in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> resulting in a new batch of pilots joining [[Black Epsilon]], [[Storm Squadron/Legends|Storm Squadron]] and the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Imperial Inquisition's squadron]].<ref name="SWG:JtL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cilas Veckon was mentioned in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:JTIN" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Admiral Cilas Veckon appeared in in-game email sent to players to introduce the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] on [[October 27]], [[2004]].<ref name="SWG:JTIN" />
